builds.name: Hera 17 Pop Georgians Healing Scout Rush
builds.summary: Fast Georgian scout opening using the mule cart bonus, deer lures and a short Feudal Age into cavalry pressure.

steps.title: Sheep start
steps.instruction: Send the first 7 villagers to sheep. Keep the TC producing.

steps.title: First boar
steps.instruction: Send the next villager to lure the first boar.

steps.title: Food under TC
steps.instruction: Add 3 more villagers to boar or sheep under the TC. Lure deer with the scout while the mule cart explores.

steps.title: Mill berries
steps.instruction: Send 1 villager to build a house, then make a mill on berries.

steps.title: Second boar
steps.instruction: Send 1 villager to lure the second boar.

steps.title: Finish food setup
steps.instruction: Add 3 more villagers to hunt under the TC, then either research Loom or make one extra villager.

steps.title: Click Feudal
steps.instruction: Research Feudal Age. On the way up, move 8 hunt villagers to the mule-cart woodline and 3 more to berries.

steps.title: Barracks timing
steps.instruction: At about 50-60 percent Feudal, send 2 villagers to build a barracks. Queue Loom if you skipped it.

steps.title: Stable and upgrades
steps.instruction: Build a stable, research Double-Bit Axe and start walling both sides with the stable builders.

steps.title: Scout pressure
steps.instruction: Make 3 scouts, harass, research Horse Collar and seed farms as wood allows.

steps.title: Castle setup
steps.instruction: After 13-14 farms, send the next 7 villagers to gold, make a mule cart and add a blacksmith.

steps.title: Castle follow-up
steps.instruction: Click Castle Age as soon as resources allow. Plan either 2-stable knights or castle plus Monaspa play.

builds.name: Hera 18 Pop Japanese Man-at-Arms Rush
builds.summary: Very fast Japanese men-at-arms pressure followed by archers and early Fletching.

steps.title: Sheep start
steps.instruction: Send 6 villagers to sheep and keep villager production constant.

steps.title: First wood
steps.instruction: Send 2 villagers to wood.

steps.title: First boar
steps.instruction: Send 1 villager to lure the first boar.

steps.title: More boar food
steps.instruction: Send 1 more villager to boar under the TC. Lure at least 2 deer.

steps.title: House and hunt
steps.instruction: Send 1 villager to make a house, then return to food under the TC.

steps.title: Second boar window
steps.instruction: Send the next 2 villagers to hunt under the TC and get the second boar during this time.

steps.title: Forward barracks
steps.instruction: Send 1 villager to build a barracks near the front of your base.

steps.title: Food and Loom
steps.instruction: Send 2 more villagers to food under the TC, then research Loom.

steps.title: Click Feudal
steps.instruction: Send 1 villager to wood and research Feudal Age. Move 2 hunt villagers to gold and make a mining camp.

steps.title: Militia and range
steps.instruction: Make 3 militia, send them forward, move 4 TC-food villagers to wood and add an archery range.

steps.title: MAA upgrade
steps.instruction: Research Man-at-Arms, add a blacksmith when affordable and research Double-Bit Axe.

steps.title: Gold and berries
steps.instruction: Send 2 villagers to gold, then 1 villager to berries and build a mill.

steps.title: Fletching attack
steps.instruction: Add farms and berries before sheep run out, prioritize Fletching, then group archers with remaining men-at-arms.

builds.name: Hera 19 Pop Ethiopian 2-Range Archers
builds.summary: Aggressive Ethiopian two-range archer opening that sells stone for a faster Castle Age.

steps.title: Sheep start
steps.instruction: Send 6 villagers to sheep.

steps.title: Wood and house
steps.instruction: Send 2 villagers to wood and build a house with one of them.

steps.title: First boar
steps.instruction: Send 1 villager to lure the first boar. Lure 1-3 deer if possible.

steps.title: Food mass
steps.instruction: Send the next 6 villagers to hunt under the TC and get the second boar during this time.

steps.title: First gold
steps.instruction: Send 1 villager to build a mining camp on gold.

steps.title: Click Feudal
steps.instruction: Send 2 more villagers to food under the TC, research Loom, then click Feudal Age.

steps.title: Feudal transition
steps.instruction: Move 7 TC-food villagers to lumber, 2 to build barracks and house, and 2 to straggler trees.

steps.title: Two ranges
steps.instruction: Build 2 archery ranges and start producing archers. Use one builder for blacksmith and one back to food.

steps.title: Gold commitment
steps.instruction: Send 7 villagers to gold. Move 2 straggler villagers back to food and get Fletching.

steps.title: Berries and farms
steps.instruction: Send 6 villagers to berries. As sheep run out, add farms until you have 7-8 farms.

steps.title: Castle setup
steps.instruction: Send 2 villagers to wood and 3 to gold, make a market, sell stone and click Castle Age when ready.

steps.title: Castle upgrades
steps.instruction: Research Double-Bit Axe, Gold Mining and optionally Horse Collar. Add a second lumber camp, then get Crossbow, Bodkin and Bow Saw.

builds.name: Hera 19 Pop Feudal Drush
builds.summary: Fast Feudal timing with 2 militia on the way up, then flexible follow-up based on scouting.

steps.title: Sheep start
steps.instruction: Send 6 villagers to sheep.

steps.title: Woodline
steps.instruction: Send 3 villagers to wood.

steps.title: First boar
steps.instruction: Send 1 villager to lure the first boar.

steps.title: House and hunt
steps.instruction: Send 1 villager to make a house, then return to hunt under the TC. Lure deer if possible.

steps.title: Second boar food
steps.instruction: Send 4 villagers to hunt under the TC and get the second boar during this time.

steps.title: Front barracks
steps.instruction: Send 1 villager to build a forward-side barracks and a house next to it.

steps.title: More food
steps.instruction: Add 1 more villager to hunt under the TC.

steps.title: Click Feudal
steps.instruction: Send 1 villager to wood, research Loom, then click Feudal Age.

steps.title: Make militia
steps.instruction: Find the opponent, make 2 militia immediately and send them forward.

steps.title: Eco shift
steps.instruction: Move 4 TC-food villagers to lumber and 1 to berries to build a mill.

steps.title: Harass and tech
steps.instruction: Use the Feudal scout plus militia to harass, research Double-Bit Axe and optionally Horse Collar.

steps.title: Choose follow-up
steps.instruction: React to scouting: spears and archers versus stable, scouts or skirms versus range, or extra militia/range versus enemy MAA.

builds.name: Hera 19 Pop Korean Spear Skirm Rush
builds.summary: Flexible Feudal spear and skirmisher pressure that avoids early gold commitment.

steps.title: Sheep start
steps.instruction: Send 6 villagers to sheep.

steps.title: Wood start
steps.instruction: Send 2 villagers to wood.

steps.title: First boar
steps.instruction: Send 1 villager to lure the first boar.

steps.title: Boar food
steps.instruction: Send 2 more villagers to boar under the TC.

steps.title: Mill berries
steps.instruction: Send 1 villager to make a house, then a mill on berries.

steps.title: Second boar
steps.instruction: Send 1 villager to lure the second boar. Lure deer if possible.

steps.title: More hunt
steps.instruction: Send 2 more villagers to hunt under the TC.

steps.title: Click Feudal
steps.instruction: Send 3 more villagers to berries, research Loom, then click Feudal Age.

steps.title: Double lumber
steps.instruction: Send 3 villagers to the first lumber camp and 5 to make a second lumber camp.

steps.title: Barracks and range
steps.instruction: Build a barracks when affordable, then an archery range. Use straggler trees if wood is tight.

steps.title: Spear skirm pressure
steps.instruction: Make spears first, research Double-Bit Axe and Horse Collar, then make skirmishers and harass.

steps.title: Farm and gold setup
steps.instruction: Add farms toward 14-16, then send 7 villagers to gold, add blacksmith, get Fletching and finish walls.

builds.name: Hera 19 Pop 1-Stable Scouts
builds.summary: Quick one-stable scout opening with walling behind and optional skirmisher transition.

steps.title: Sheep start
steps.instruction: Send 6 villagers to sheep.

steps.title: Wood start
steps.instruction: Send 2 villagers to wood.

steps.title: First boar
steps.instruction: Send 1 villager to lure the first boar.

steps.title: Mill berries
steps.instruction: Send 1 villager to make a house, then a mill on berries. Lure deer if possible.

steps.title: Food mass
steps.instruction: Send 6 villagers to hunt under the TC and get the second boar during this time.

steps.title: Click Feudal
steps.instruction: Send 2 villagers to wood, research Loom, then click Feudal Age.

steps.title: Wood transition
steps.instruction: Either send 4 villagers to the first lumber camp for aggression or 5 to a new lumber camp for safety.

steps.title: Berries and barracks
steps.instruction: Move 4 TC-food villagers to berries and 1 to build a barracks about 60 percent to Feudal.

steps.title: Stable
steps.instruction: Build a stable with 2 villagers, research Double-Bit Axe and Horse Collar.

steps.title: Scout pressure
steps.instruction: Use stable builders to wall, seed farms, make scouts and attack or defend as needed.

steps.title: Adapt
steps.instruction: Add 1-4 spears if worried about enemy scouts, or add a range for skirmishers if opponent is on archers/spears.

steps.title: Castle plan
steps.instruction: Add blacksmith, consider Bloodlines with 7-8 scouts and plan 2-stable knights or elite skirm in Castle Age.

builds.name: Hera 20 Pop 1-Range Archers
builds.summary: Fast one-range archer opening that prioritizes Fletching and a clean Castle Age transition.

steps.title: Sheep start
steps.instruction: Send 6 villagers to sheep.

steps.title: Woodline
steps.instruction: Send 3 villagers to wood.

steps.title: First boar
steps.instruction: Send 1 villager to lure the first boar.

steps.title: Mill berries
steps.instruction: Send 1 villager to make a house, then a mill on berries. Lure deer if possible.

steps.title: Food mass
steps.instruction: Send 6 villagers to hunt under the TC and get the second boar during this time.

steps.title: Click Feudal
steps.instruction: Send 2 villagers to wood, research Loom, then click Feudal Age.

steps.title: Transition split
steps.instruction: Move 5 villagers to a second lumber camp, 2 to stragglers, 1 to house into barracks, and 2 to gold.

steps.title: Range production
steps.instruction: Research Double-Bit Axe, skip Horse Collar for now, build one range and start archers.

steps.title: Gold and blacksmith
steps.instruction: Send 2 villagers to gold, then add a blacksmith and get Fletching when affordable.

steps.title: Defense and farms
steps.instruction: Make 1-4 spears if needed, move 4 more TC villagers to berries and start farms.

steps.title: Wall and mass
steps.instruction: Wall with 2-3 villagers while keeping archer production. Aim for 10-15 archers before Castle Age.

steps.title: Castle transition
steps.instruction: On the way to Castle, add a second production building, then get Crossbowman, Bodkin and Bow Saw.

builds.name: Hera 20 Pop + 3 Fishing Ship Build
builds.summary: Dark Age dock with up to 3 fishing ships for hybrid and water maps.

steps.title: Sheep start
steps.instruction: Send 6 villagers to sheep.

steps.title: Wood heavy
steps.instruction: Send 5 villagers to wood.

steps.title: First boar
steps.instruction: Send 1 villager to lure the first boar.

steps.title: Dock
steps.instruction: Send 1 villager to make a house, then a dock, then usually take shore fish.

steps.title: More boar food
steps.instruction: Add 1 villager to boar under the TC.

steps.title: Second boar
steps.instruction: Send 1 villager to lure the second boar.

steps.title: Fishing ships
steps.instruction: Make fishing ships up to 3 as soon as the dock is up. Add a house after the first fishing ship if needed.

steps.title: Click Feudal
steps.instruction: Add 4 more villagers to food under the TC, research Loom, then click Feudal Age.

steps.title: Second lumber camp
steps.instruction: On the way up, take 7 sheep villagers and make a second lumber camp on another woodline.

steps.title: Water follow-up
steps.instruction: For water aggression, move remaining sheep villagers to stragglers and send 3 to gold for galleys or 5 for fire galleys.

steps.title: Land follow-up
steps.instruction: On hybrid maps, add barracks on the way up. For archers, send 3 remaining sheep villagers to gold; for scouts or skirms, keep them on food.

builds.name: Hera 24+2 Pop Fast Castle Boom
builds.summary: Safe economy-focused fast Castle build for closed maps into extra TCs and eco upgrades.

steps.title: Sheep start
steps.instruction: Send 6 villagers to sheep.

steps.title: Woodline
steps.instruction: Send 3 villagers to wood.

steps.title: First boar
steps.instruction: Send 1 villager to lure the first boar.

steps.title: Mill berries
steps.instruction: Send 1 villager to make a house, then a mill on berries. Lure 3 deer into the TC if possible.

steps.title: Second boar
steps.instruction: Add 2 more villagers to hunt under the TC and grab the second boar.

steps.title: Berries
steps.instruction: Send 4 more villagers to berries. Seed 4 farms with sheep villagers when boars run out.

steps.title: More wood
steps.instruction: Send 4 more villagers to wood on one lumber camp.

steps.title: Click Feudal
steps.instruction: Send 2 villagers to gold and research Feudal Age. Send remaining TC-food villagers to straggler trees as food expires.

steps.title: Feudal buildings
steps.instruction: Send 1 villager to blacksmith and 2 to market, then send 2 more villagers to wood.

steps.title: Click Castle
steps.instruction: Research Castle Age, then research Double-Bit Axe and Horse Collar.

steps.title: Boom start
steps.instruction: Move 1 straggler villager to the lumber camp, seed farms with remaining straggler villagers and make a second TC on wood.

steps.title: Third TC
steps.instruction: Research Bow Saw, add another TC on secondary gold or main stone and use the market to balance resources.

builds.name: Hera 26+2 Armenian Spear FC Relic Control
builds.summary: Armenian dark-age spear harassment into walling, fortified church and fast relic control.

steps.title: Sheep start
steps.instruction: Send 6 villagers to sheep.

steps.title: Woodline
steps.instruction: Send 4 villagers to wood.

steps.title: First boar
steps.instruction: Send 1 villager to lure the first boar.

steps.title: Barracks waller
steps.instruction: Send 1 villager to build house, barracks, house in front and start slow walling.

steps.title: Boar food
steps.instruction: Send 2 more villagers to boar under the TC. Lure deer if possible.

steps.title: Second boar
steps.instruction: Send 1 villager to lure the second boar.

steps.title: Make spears
steps.instruction: Send 2 more villagers to boar under the TC, then make 2-3 spears and harass with your scout.

steps.title: Berries
steps.instruction: Send 6 villagers to berries and build a mill. Move 2 hunt villagers to walling duty.

steps.title: Gold and click Feudal
steps.instruction: Send 3 villagers to gold, then move 5 food villagers to wood, start farms, research Loom and click Feudal.

steps.title: Feudal buildings
steps.instruction: When walling is done, send wallers to stragglers. Build market and blacksmith with 3 straggler villagers.

steps.title: Click Castle
steps.instruction: Send 2 more villagers to gold. If short, make 1-2 more villagers or use the market, then click Castle Age.

steps.title: Relic control
steps.instruction: Research Double-Bit Axe and Horse Collar, make a fortified church defensively, spam warrior priests for relics and research Bow Saw.

builds.name: Hera 26+2 Fast Castle into Unique Unit
builds.summary: Fast Castle build that drops a defensive or forward castle and transitions into strong unique units.

steps.title: Sheep start
steps.instruction: Send 6 villagers to sheep.

steps.title: Woodline
steps.instruction: Send 3 villagers to wood.

steps.title: First boar
steps.instruction: Send 1 villager to lure the first boar.

steps.title: Mill berries
steps.instruction: Send 1 villager to make a house, then a mill on berries. Lure nearby deer if possible.

steps.title: Second boar
steps.instruction: Add 3 more villagers to hunt under the TC and grab the second boar.

steps.title: Berries
steps.instruction: Send 4 more villagers to berries. Seed 3 farms with hunt villagers so sheep lasts longer.

steps.title: More wood
steps.instruction: Send 5 more villagers to wood on one lumber camp.

steps.title: Click Feudal
steps.instruction: Send 2 villagers to gold and click Feudal Age.

steps.title: Stone and buildings
steps.instruction: When sheep runs out, send 4 villagers to stone and 3 to stragglers for market and blacksmith.

steps.title: More stone
steps.instruction: Send 2 villagers to stone.

steps.title: Click Castle
steps.instruction: Research Castle Age, then Double-Bit Axe and Horse Collar.

steps.title: Castle drop
steps.instruction: Drop the castle with stone villagers, research Bow Saw and send idle berry villagers to the resource you need.

builds.name: Hera 29+2+2 Turk Fast Imperial
builds.summary: Turk fast Imperial build into immediate Hand Cannoneers and Bombard Cannons.

steps.title: Sheep start
steps.instruction: Send 6 villagers to sheep.

steps.title: Woodline
steps.instruction: Send 4 villagers to wood.

steps.title: First boar
steps.instruction: Send 1 villager to lure the first boar.

steps.title: Mill berries
steps.instruction: Send 1 villager to make a house, then a mill on berries.

steps.title: More berries
steps.instruction: Send 2 villagers to berries. Lure 3 deer into the TC.

steps.title: Second boar
steps.instruction: Send 1 villager to lure the second boar.

steps.title: House to berries
steps.instruction: Send 1 villager to make a house, then go to berries for 4 total.

steps.title: More TC food
steps.instruction: Send the next 3 villagers to gather food under the TC.

steps.title: More wood
steps.instruction: Send 4 villagers to wood and gradually farm with sheep villagers as sheep run out.

steps.title: Click Feudal
steps.instruction: Send 5 villagers to gold and click Feudal Age. As hunt finishes, move 1 to berries and 3 to stragglers.

steps.title: Click Castle
steps.instruction: Build blacksmith and market, send 2 more villagers to gold, then click Castle Age.

steps.title: Click Imperial
steps.instruction: Move Feudal builders to farms, research Double-Bit Axe and Gold Mining, sell 200 stone, send 2 more villagers to gold and click Imperial Age.

steps.title: Gunpowder setup
steps.instruction: Send 3 wood villagers to build siege workshop and monastery. Use market for barracks and 2 ranges, get first archer armor and make Hand Cannoneers plus Bombard Cannons.
